header.title: Create exams with AI
header.description: Chat experience to generate question banks and summaries.

language.label: Generate in:
language.tooltip:
Automatic: The agent auto-detects
language based on context, topic,
and exam type.
Recommended for best results.

context.title: Document context
context.description: Upload up to 5 files to be summarized by AI to serve as context for exam generation.
context.summaryNotReady: The summary will be available once the processing is complete.
context.summaryDesc: Preview of the summary generated by AI.
context.uploadError: Could not upload the document. Please verify that the file is valid and has a supported format (PDF, DOCX, PPTX, images).

results.title: Results
results.empty: Results will appear here after generation.
results.hintTooltip: Click the button to view generated questions.

deleteDialog.title: Delete question?
deleteDialog.description: This question will be removed from the generated exam. This action cannot be undone.

editor.title: Edit question
editor.description: Adjust prompt, options, correct answer and metadata.

discardDialog.title: Discard changes?
discardDialog.description: You have unsaved changes. If you close the editor, these changes will be lost.

clearDialog.title: Clear chat data?
clearDialog.description: This action will clear documents and outputs in the browser, the document context and the local draft of the AI-generated exam.

clearToasts.successDesc: Documents, outputs and the local draft were cleared.
clearToasts.errorDesc: Could not fully clear local storage.

loadDraft.successDesc: You can edit the questions in the chat.

create.title: Save exam draft
create.description: Complete general information to save this exam as a draft.

edit.title: Save exam changes
edit.description: Questions will be updated with your changes. Subject and group are not modified.

toasts.savedDesc: The exam has been saved as a draft.
toasts.invalidContract: Invalid JSON contract, please try again

chat.title: Chat
chat.description: Describe the exam you want to generate and refine with instructions.
chat.needLogin: You must sign in to use AI.
chat.examGenerated: ✨ Exam generated successfully with {count} questions. Review the results in the Results panel.

toasts.successDesc: Review the generated exam on the Results panel.
toasts.errorDesc: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
toasts.invalidJson: Error in the assistant's response. Try again.
toasts.invalidContract: The response did not meet the expected contract. Rules adjusted, you can retry.

empty.title: How can I help you today?
empty.subtitle: Pick a suggestion or write your own instructions below.

examples.modifyQuestion: Let's modify question 2 of this exam and make it about ...
examples.useDocuments: Please use the attached documents to generate ... questions.
examples.moreHarder: Generate 3 additional questions and increase the difficulty to advanced.
